heroBio: 18+ years shipping software that had to work — cockpit displays, CAD, robot metrology, Europe's largest car marketplace and autonomous movers . Now I hold AI to the same bar.
manifestoMiddle: Eighteen years of software that had to work.
dreamLine: One day, governments will build correctional facilities for bad agents.

pillars.title: Transparency
pillars.note: Say what's true, even when it's inconvenient. It's how trust starts.

pillars.title: Trust
pillars.note: I don't trust words. I trust work. Judge people — and yourself — by what ships.

pillars.title: Positivity
pillars.note: Momentum beats perfection. Failures are the team's; wins are the team's.

signatureQuotes: Save cost. Save time. That's what an engineer does.
MLP, not MVP — Most Lovable Product.
We failed as a team. We succeeded as a team.
Flying a rocket ship while it's being built.
